subcodes.first_line: O my God and the God of all the world, my Lord and the Lord of the nations! I entreat Thee by Thy Most Great Name, whereby tribulations have arisen
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و اله العالم و سیدی و سید الامم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به ظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
